{{Infobox artifact
| name = Blood Core
| introduced = Reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Blood Core]] is kept in a prison that looks identical to the one used for the [[Storm Core]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8">''Reaper'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Blood Core]] sends a crimson pillar of light up to the ceiling.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] possesses a [[Blood Core]] that is overpowering its silver container.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Blood Core]] is a huge red sphere.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
